title: Values Schema for MapColonies Labels and Annotations

environment.description: The environment in which the deployment is running

partOf.description: The system this deployment is part of

owner.description: The team that owns this deployment

gisDomain.description: The GIS domain this deployment relates to

enabled.description: Whether Prometheus metrics are enabled for this deployment

port.description: The port on which Prometheus metrics are exposed

path.description: The path on which Prometheus metrics are exposed

logScraping.description: Whether to enable log scraping for this deployment
